title: Timefall SMP Official Pack
description: This is the modpack for the official Timefall Development SMP. The pack will be updated with each season.
body:
[![Discord Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-Timefall%20Development-5865F2?style=for-the-badge&logo=Discord)](https://discord.com/invite/6XC74Gk7Jc)
[![Patreon Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Patreon-Become%20a%20Patron-FF424D?style=for-the-badge&logo=Patreon)](https://www.patreon.com/bePatron?u=44270858)

![Image with the text Timefall SMP The Official SMP of Timefall Development](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Y8KR4LMx/images/44f23d46f2b4c1a9f234705ad00ecb6a17a9ef22.png)

Modded adventure, building and exploration modpack. This is the official modpack of the Timefall SMP

This modpack does not use Optifine and, in fact, would break if you tried to use it. Please use the features of Iris to implement shaders.

__Pack Features__

⌛ World Generation provided by Tectonic

⌛ Built in shaders: Including, but not limited to [Overimagined Shaders by isuewo](https://github.com/isuewo/OverimaginedShaders "Overimagined Shaders by isuewo") & [Rethinking Voxels by gri573](https://modrinth.com/shader/rethinking-voxels)

⌛ Many new mobs courtesy of Naturalist, Chirpy's Wildlife and much more

⌛ Mythic Mounts, because they're adorable

⌛ Magic courtesy of Daedelus' RPG Series, Simply Skills, Conjuring and Amethyst Imbuement

⌛ New Weapons and Armors courtesy of MC Dungeons Weapons, MC Dungeons Armors and Pure Ores

⌛ New Combat Style courtesy of Better Combat

⌛ Overhauled Nether and End courtesy of Cinderscapes and Better End

⌛ Waystones courtesy of Fabric Waystones

⌛ Minimap and World Map using Xaero's Mini Map and Xaero's World Map

⌛ Many Quality of Life mods

⌛ Aesthetics provided by the Macaw Suite of mods and Adorn

⌛ Food expansion courtesy of Farmer's Delight

⌛ Make music with friends using the Music Maker Mod by xerca0

⌛ Plenty to explore with the Yung's Better Minecraft Suite and Repurposed Structures

⌛ Streamer Friendly SMP (Reference* and Verification Required) on a rock solid server

__Sponsors__

[![25 Percent Off Link to BisectHosting](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/9deaa8f0-11c2-41f1-8f4f-32d2493b0912.png)](https://www.bisecthosting.com/Timefall?r=CF+TSMP+Pack)

__TSMP Team__
- Chronos_Sacaria - Organiser, Dev and Co-Founder of Timefall Development
- EternalAmaiti - Project Manager, Lead Builder, Terraformer
- fzzyhmstrs - Dev and Tester
- Helloitsmekami - Lead Decorator
- Kluzzio - Co-Founder of Timefall Development
- purejosh - Server Manager
- Sweeney - Core Member of Timefall Development, Dev and Tester
- Zarrathoz - Tester and Master of Bug Hunting

__Copyright Notices__

- The Timefall Development Hourglass is a copyright of and is the sole property of Timefall Development
- All mods and shader packs contained in this modpack are subject to their respective licenses and are the copyright of their respective authors
- Any recorded content (streaming or recorded video for YouTube) created on the Timefall SMP is owned by the respective recorder. If content is recorded by multiple individuals, their perspectives are owned by them

__Content Creation__

- This pack may be used to stream and/or record content. However, if you are going to stream or record content on the Timefall SMP, please be sure to follow the content creation guidelines outlined in the [timefall-smp-rules channel](https://discord.com/channels/808825402566377532/1063080997316460574/1064074349809766441) in the Timefall Development Discord. You will need, at least, the TSMP Interest role to be able to see this channel.

__Credits__

- Thank you to Sweeney for the amazing banner for the modpack page and 
- Thank you to purejosh for helping with managing the server
- Thank you Kluzzio for the creation of the Timefall Development Hourglass Logo
- Thank you to all of the amazing mod devs who have helped make the server what it is today: especially fzzyhmstrs and Sweeney

\* Your reference must have the "`Friend of Timefall`", "`Friend of Timefall | Dev`" or "`Friend of Timefall | Artist`" role in the Timefall Development Discord (references will be followed up on). If you would like to join the SMP, but lack a reference, we encourage you to be active in the community, take part in the Streams by the various members of Team Timefall, Mythic Tea Party and Tijger Clan, as well as the independent streamers through their chats and individual Discord Servers. The more we get to know you, the better we will know if you're a good fit for the server :)
